ab: maqati a ku kisedjaman sun ta paisu?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: pida su kisedjamen?
na madraudrau aken a masi paisu ka kadjaman, maqati sun a pasedjam tjanuaken?
ch: A:我早上忘了帶錢，你可以借我錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: neka nu naseliaw a ku sipasedjam tjanusun.
ch: B:我沒有多餘的錢可以借你耶!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: mayanga, inika su pinacikel a su kinisedjam ka tjaisangas.
ch: B:而且，你還沒還我上次借的錢餒。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: maqati aken a kisedjam ta su kava?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: maqati, saw alapu ta su sikava.
ch: B:好，你自己拿你要穿的衣服。
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: maqati a su pasedjaman aken ta su sunatj?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: ku sinipasedjam anga tjai kapi.
en: B: I lent it to piya.

ab: nasakisedjam aken ta su zidingsia, maqati?
ch: A:我想跟你的腳踏車，可以借我嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: maqati, ljakua pacikelu anga nutiaw.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: qemudjalj anga, namasi ljinay sun?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: izua ku ljinay, kaciuri a ljeminay numaya!
ch: B: 我有帶傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: pacikel aken tjanusun ta ku kinisedjam ka tjaisangas a sunatj.
ch: A:我要還你上次借我的書。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: nasapacun anan sun ta zuma a sunatj?
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: nungida anga a ku sivalit tjanusun ta paisu?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: pumayan, pacikelu anga nu izua su paisu.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn't matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: nungida su valitan aken ta su kinisedjam a paisu?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: ku valitan sun nutiaw.
en: A: I will return it to you tomorrow.

ab: nungida su pacikelen a ku sunatj.
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: aku ku pinacikel anga katiaw?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: ti pia napasedjam tjanusun ta inpic?
en: A: Did Pia lend you this pen?

ab: ui, pinasedjaman aken ta inpic nimadju.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: aicu a inpic su kinisedjam tjai piya?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from piya?

ab: ini, vinelian na ku kina tjanuaken.
ch: B:不是，這是媽媽買給我的。
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: neka anga qatia, kisedjamu ta nia tjuku.
en: A: We are out of salt, so let's borrow some from tjuku.

ab: ui, ku kisedjamay.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: pacikelu ayavu ti muni ta kinisedjam tjanuaken a paisu.
en: B: Go tell mumi to return my money.

ab: pida kinisedjam a paisu tjanusun?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
